2026-04-02.briefing:
This is a test briefing for 2026-04-02. SpaceX continued work on Starship development while preparing for upcoming Falcon 9 missions. The company also made progress on Starlink constellation expansion.

In business news, SpaceX IPO discussions dominated headlines with multiple reports suggesting a record-breaking public offering could be imminent.

Quick hits: Several launches were scheduled from both Cape Canaveral and Vandenberg, and the FCC continued reviewing Starlink spectrum allocation requests.
